acceptance_criteria: WHEN checkRequirementDeduplication() runs THEN exact fingerprint duplicates use method fingerprint, near text duplicates use method jaccard with similarity, optional semantic client can add method semantic with reasoning, and no API key or prompt secret is logged; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-intelligence-enhancement.md:304

review_regression_requirements: Run tests/dedup-checker.test.ts tests/inference.test.ts and npm test.
